steps.description: Click the "Compare Contoso Electronics plan" card within the vscuse_app_FdvBKdev tab in Microsoft Teams (web app), specifically on the card title text.
Press the Enter key in the message input box of the vscuse_app_FdvBKdev tab within Microsoft Teams (web), to submit the text "Compare Contoso Electronics plan".
@assertion validation  message like "Northwind Health Plus offers comprehensive coverage" is exist.
Click the "Close" button (X) at the top-right corner of the Microsoft Teams web app window in Google Chrome to exit the application tab.
